title: Newman and Cole 12" Wooden Broom Head with Soft Natural Coco Bristle Replacement Wooden Broom Head Indoor or Outdoor Soft Bristle Broom Floor Sweeping Brush with Plastic Fixing Bracket Connector
features: Newman and Cole Soft Broom Sweeping Brush Head - Natural Coco bristles give a soft sweeping action and are suitable for use in dry conditions. Making the broom perfect for indoor sweeping or cleaning of large smooth dry areas such as patios or concrete floors
Traditional Wooden Broom Head - Featuring a wood stock with soft natural coco bristles the brush is also fitted with a plastic bracket connector for easy fixing too a wooden broom handle

Sweep and Clean Up - The broom head is the ideal soft push broom to sweep up outdoor areas such as driveways, paths & patios but can also be used indoors in kitchens etc. The brush head is perfectly angled to give the best sweeping action.
The Perfect Replacement Wooden Broom Brush Head - 12" 300mm wide soft wooden broom head fitted with connector bracket for easy fixing to your broom handle.
Trusted Brand - Newman and Cole know what you want from a broom and aim to deliver exactly that!
description: Newman and Cole replacement wooden broom head with soft natural coco fibre bristles. 12" wide (300mm) and perfect for sweeping and cleaning outdoor & indoor. The soft bristle broom is heavy duty and hard wearing.
